description.baseEffect:
1 Action. Click to open the Spirit Companion dialog. Choose your Spirit's strike die and (the first time) upload a token image. The spirit appears adjacent to you with attack and healing formulas already wired to your WIL bonus and chosen die.

The spirit is immune to damage, occupies one square, and acts on your turn. While summoned, you may use one of its actions in place of one of yours: Spirit Strike (1 Action, Reach 6, deals (Spirit Die) + WIL radiant damage) or Spirit Heal (1 Action, Reach 6, heals a willing ally (Spirit Die) + WIL).

Re-cast this spell to dismiss the current spirit and summon a new one (or change the die size). The dialog also offers an explicit Dismiss Spirit action.
